|desc=Cyrus sent out {{p|Weavile}} to battle Hareta. Hareta uses {{TP|Hareta|Piplup}} to battle it. Even though Weavile had the upper hand, it was hereby defeated after a surprise attack from Piplup.

Weavile's known moves are {{m|Night Slash}}, {{m|Ice Beam}}, and {{m|Hyper Beam}}.}}

{{anchor|Gyarados 2}}{{TrainerPoké

|pkmn=Gyarados

|type2=Flying

|epname=Team Galactic's Conspiracy, Revealed!!
|desc={{p|Gyarados}} was sent out after his Weavile suffered tons of damage from Piplup's surprise attack. Gyarados used Giga Impact to send them away, thus ending the battle. Later, during Hareta's rematch after Saturn's loss, Cyrus had his Gyarados battle Hareta and his Piplup despite the former feeling weak due to {{TP|Saturn|Toxicroak}}'s {{m|Poison Jab|poisoning}} that happened earlier. The battle was declared as a draw when Cyrus and the others retreated after witnessing Piplup's {{a|Torrent|giant}} {{m|Surf|wave}}.

Gyarados's known moves are {{m|Giga Impact}}, {{m|Dragon Dance}}, and {{m|Bite}}.}}
